title: Coverage, Thresholds, and Meaningful Evidence
description: Set coverage policy that exposes risk without encouraging empty tests. Learners cumulatively produce a changed-code coverage and exception policy through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Interpret line, branch, function, condition, and path coverage limitations.
Choose global, package, and changed-code thresholds from risk and baseline.
Exclude generated or unreachable code with reviewed narrow rules.
